question: What are the main requirements for a quadcopter to hover successfully?

options.text: The net thrust of the four rotors pushing the drone up must be equal to the gravitational force pulling it down.
The net thrust of the 2 rear rotors pushing the drone up must be equal to the gravitational force pulling it down.
The net thrust of the 2 front rotors pushing the drone up must be equal to the gravitational force pulling it down.

classification_notes: Hover requires thrust equal to weight.
